description_long: This is a rectangular wooden picnic table with integrated benches on either side, designed for communal outdoor seating. The tabletop and benches are constructed from evenly spaced, parallel wooden planks, giving it a classic, rustic appearance. The support structure consists of sturdy wooden legs and crossbeams, providing stability and durability for frequent use. The wood appears to be lightly finished, maintaining a natural, slightly weathered look suitable for outdoor environments. The benches are directly attached to the table frame, ensuring they remain aligned and secure. There is no visible umbrella hole in the center of the tabletop, indicating it is intended for open-air use without built-in shade.
description: A rectangular wooden picnic table with integrated benches and a classic slatted design, supported by robust wooden legs and crossbeams.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full rectangular tabletop and one bench, highlighting the parallel plank construction.
description_view_1: End view emphasizing the length of the table and benches, with the support structure and leg arrangement visible underneath.
description_view_2: Another top-down view, nearly identical to view 0, showing the tabletop and opposite bench.
description_view_3: End view from the opposite side, mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the bench and support beams.
attribute_tabletop_support_structure: The tabletop is supported by four sturdy wooden legs connected by horizontal crossbeams and braces, providing stability and strength across the length of the table.
